meta.summary: UCSC Genome Browser kent-core command-line utilities for bigBed, bigWig, twoBit, PSL, BED, and related genome-browser formats.
meta.description: UCSC Genome Browser kent-core command-line utilities for bigBed, bigWig, twoBit, PSL, BED, and related genome-browser formats.

test: ucsc-kent --version | grep -F 'ucsc-kent 492' >/dev/null && ucsc-kent --list | grep -F 'bedToBigBed' >/dev/null && ucsc-kent --list | grep -F 'bigWigInfo' >/dev/null && grep -F 'commit b6df349dcf619123c01e8a5993c6ac6d4001a716' /opt/ucsc-kent/share/doc/ucsc-kent/source.txt >/dev/null && { bedToBigBed 2>&1 || true; } | grep -F 'bedToBigBed' >/dev/null && { bigWigInfo 2>&1 || true; } | grep -F 'bigWigInfo' >/dev/null && ldd $(command -v bedToBigBed) | grep -F libc >/dev/null && ! ldd $(command -v bedToBigBed) | grep -F 'not found' >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-ucsc-kent-twobit && cd /tmp/taf-ucsc-kent-twobit && printf '>chr1
ACGTACGTNN
>chr2
TTAGGG
' > ref.fa && faToTwoBit ref.fa ref.2bit && twoBitInfo ref.2bit stdout > sizes.txt && grep -F "$(printf 'chr1	10')" sizes.txt >/dev/null && twoBitToFa ref.2bit stdout > roundtrip.fa && grep -F '>chr2' roundtrip.fa >/dev/null && faSize ref.fa > faSize.txt && grep -F '2 sequences' faSize.txt >/dev/null && faCount ref.fa > faCount.txt && grep -F "$(printf 'chr1	10')" faCount.txt >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-ucsc-kent-bigbed && cd /tmp/taf-ucsc-kent-bigbed && printf 'chr1\t1000\n' > chrom.sizes && printf 'chr1\t10\t20\tfeature1\t0\t+\n' > in.bed && bedToBigBed -type=bed6 in.bed chrom.sizes out.bb && bigBedInfo out.bb > info.txt && grep -F 'itemCount: 1' info.txt >/dev/null && bigBedToBed out.bb out.bed && grep -F "$(printf 'chr1\t10\t20\tfeature1')" out.bed >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-ucsc-kent-bigwig && cd /tmp/taf-ucsc-kent-bigwig && printf 'chr1	1000
' > chrom.sizes && printf 'fixedStep chrom=chr1 start=1 step=1
1
2
3
' > in.wig && wigToBigWig in.wig chrom.sizes out.bw && bigWigInfo out.bw > info.txt && grep -F 'basesCovered: 3' info.txt >/dev/null && bigWigToWig out.bw out.wig && grep -F 'fixedStep chrom=chr1' out.wig >/dev/null && printf 'chr1	0	10	1.5
chr1	10	20	2.5
' > graph.bedGraph && bedGraphToBigWig graph.bedGraph chrom.sizes graph.bw && bigWigSummary graph.bw chr1 0 20 2 > summary.txt && grep -F '1.5' summary.txt >/dev/null

mkdir -p /tmp/taf-ucsc-kent-scripts && cd /tmp/taf-ucsc-kent-scripts && python3 -m py_compile /opt/ucsc-kent/bin/bedJoinTabOffset.py /opt/ucsc-kent/bin/ucscApiClient /opt/ucsc-kent/bin/chromToUcsc /opt/ucsc-kent/bin/tdbRename /opt/ucsc-kent/bin/tdbSort && perl -c /opt/ucsc-kent/bin/vai.pl >/dev/null && printf 'name1\tvalue\n' > data.tab && printf 'chr1\t0\t5\tname1\n' > in.bed && bedJoinTabOffset.py data.tab in.bed out.bed >/tmp/taf-ucsc-kent-bedJoin.log 2>&1 && grep -F "$(printf 'chr1\t0\t5\tname1\t0\t12')" out.bed >/dev/null

upstream.name: kent-core
upstream.citation: UCSC Genome Browser kent-core command-line utilities, UC Santa Cruz Genomics Institute
